worker_attempts.visible_answer:
You're very welcome, Oluwaseun! I'm glad I could help clarify the referral requirements and the importance of having your friend make their own purchases. It's great that you're taking the right steps to ensure everything is done properly.

Just to recap:
- Your friend needs to spend **$750 within 60 days** of account opening (by approximately mid-January 2026)
- Once they meet that requirement, you'll receive your **$75 referral bonus** within one to two billing cycles
- You can track the referral status anytime through your Rho-Bank mobile app or online banking

If you have any other questions about your referrals, credit card accounts, or anything else, don't hesitate to reach out. Have a great day!
